Making your

I'm Dianne — a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant with 3+ years of experience helping businesses run smoother. I specialize in product listing, graphic design, content creation, and automation workflows that free up your time so you can focus on growing your business.

Lead Capture Automation

CRM Follow-Up Pipeline

E-commerce Order Automation

Every new Shopify order triggers a confirmation email, spreadsheet log, and Slack alert — all in seconds, no manual work.

★ Zapier
Social Media Content

Actyra — Thought Leadership Content

A series of branded social media cards for Actyra covering AI, learning systems, and workplace insights. Bold orange and slate palette — 18 cards designed for consistent brand presence.

Social Media · Content Creation · 18 Cards

Dr. Apple Chips — Instagram Feed

A vibrant, grid-cohesive Instagram content series. Warm reds and playful typography bring the brand's healthy snack personality to life.

Instagram · Content Series

ActyraxAPI & ScormxAPI — Reddit Banners

Eight distinct Reddit banner concepts across two brands — pixel art, space, illustrated, dark organic, retro, and bold graphic styles.

Reddit Banners · 8 Concepts

Astronaut Ice Cream — Product Ad

A bold, otherworldly product graphic — dreamy pink-purple space scene with a suited astronaut and the tagline "Take a bite beyond Earth!" Designed for high visual impact across social and digital ads.

Product Design · Graphic Design

Maison Heureuse — Product Catalog

A minimalist furniture product listing flyer for Maison Heureuse — featuring hero banner, product grid with pricing, star ratings, and sale badges. Clean layout designed for e-commerce and print use.

Product Listing · E-commerce Design
